title: Glass Tools
description: add  a Glass Texture to Netherite Tools
body:
# Glassy Tools Resource Pack

**Version:** 1.0  
**Minecraft Version:** 1.20+  
**Resolution:** 16x16  

![Glassy Tools Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xL3cRDZk/images/08d7dd1198fee7873cfa959fc15b2f8df6a6d4c0_350.webp)

## Overview

**Glassy Tools** is a minimalist resource pack that transforms your Netherite tools and sword with a sleek, transparent glass texture. Bring a modern and elegant aesthetic to your Minecraft experience as you wield shimmering, glass-like tools that stand out in any inventory or hotbar.

### Features
- **Enhanced Visuals:** Adds a unique glass texture to all Netherite tools and sword, creating a translucent look without affecting durability or functionality.
- **Immersive and Unique:** Perfect for players looking to add a subtle, stylish twist to their high-level gear without overwhelming Minecraft’s classic style.

### Included Tools
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe

## Compatibility
This pack is compatible with Minecraft 1.20+ and works seamlessly with other packs, as it only modifies the Netherite tools’ textures.

## Installation
1. Download the **Glassy Tools** .zip file.
2. Open Minecraft and navigate to `Options > Resource Packs`.
3. Select **Open Pack Folder** and place the .zip file in the folder.
4. Back in Minecraft, enable the **Glassy Tools** pack, and enjoy!
